summary:
Wiki lint complete. Here's the summary:

**Pass 1 — Structural:**
- 2 broken wikilinks fixed (`gpt-5-4-cyber` → `gpt-5.4-cyber`, `five-eyes-agent-security-guidance` → `topics/ai_safety`)
- No orphan pages (all 103 pages have inbound links)
- No companies/people in entities (all types valid)

**Pass 2 — Stale information:**
- 4 entity pages updated with fresh `last_updated` dates and content (gpt-5.4, claude-code, claude-opus-4-7, mcp-protocol)
- MCP install count aligned with rest of wiki (150M+ total)

**Pass 3 — Connection quality:**
- All 6 topic pages have `## Evolution` and `## Patterns & Insights`
- No bare "Related:" or "See also:" links in any content page
- 6 new entity pages created: agent-365, m365-e7, cursor, terminal-bench-2, ari, gemini-3-deep-think
- Inbound links added from source pages (microsoft, spacex, meta)

**Pass 4 — Index rebuilt:**
- Entities: 56 → 62
- Total wiki files: 109 (6 topics + 18 sources + 3 timelines + 62 entities + 20 ideas + 3 root files)
